IdempotencyKey.description: Unique request key retained for seven days. Within that window, reuse with different data is rejected.
IdempotencyKey.name: Idempotency-Key

Conflict.description: The idempotency key conflicts with an earlier request.

NotFound.description: The tenant-scoped resource does not exist.

RateLimited.description: The credential or source exceeded its rate limit.

ServiceUnavailable.description: A required cell-local dependency is unavailable.

Unauthorized.description: The bearer credential is missing, invalid, expired, or revoked.

signingSecret.description: Returned only by an idempotent webhook create response.

info.description: Stable, cell-aware TeamGrid API for service credentials and the TeamGrid CLI.
